requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 62368-1 under JISM/JS Standards, 230 V / 50 Hz / Mixed Plug Types (B, C, G)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — JISM/JS标准下的IEC 62368-1，230 V / 50 Hz / 混合插头类型（B型、C型、G型）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — JISM/JS標準下的IEC 62368-1，230 V / 50 Hz / 混合插頭類型（B型、C型、G型）

summary.en: Jordan operates at 230 V AC / 50 Hz mains supply. Jordan has a mixed plug environment reflecting both US and British colonial legacy: Type B (NEMA 5-15, US two/three-pin flat) and Type G (BS 1363, UK three-pin rectangular) sockets are both widely present, with Type C and Type F also found in older buildings and some regions. Electrical safety compliance for information and communications technology equipment and audio/video equipment is required to IEC 62368-1 (or its predecessor IEC 60950-1 for products in transitional scope) as adopted under JISM Jordan Standards (JS) equivalents. JISM oversees electrical safety standards. Mains-powered wireless devices must demonstrate electrical safety conformance against applicable JS standards as part of JISM's conformity assessment process where the product is in JISM regulated scope. Products must be physically compatible with Jordan mains supply (230 V / 50 Hz); Chinese Type I (two or three flat pins) or Type A plugs are not natively compatible. A Type G or Type B plug with 230 V rating is typically required depending on the target Jordanian market segment; universal adapters are common but product-level compliance is the manufacturer's responsibility.
summary.zh: 约旦市电为230 V交流/50 Hz。约旦为混合插头环境，受美国和英国历史遗产影响：B型（NEMA 5-15，美式两/三扁销）和G型（BS 1363，英式三矩形扁销）插座均普遍存在，老旧建筑和部分地区也有C型和F型。信息和通信技术设备及音视频设备的电气安全合规须依据IEC 62368-1（或对于仍在过渡范围内产品的前身IEC 60950-1），按JISM约旦标准（JS）等效标准执行。JISM负责电气安全标准管理。市电供电的无线设备在产品属于JISM受监管范围时，须作为JISM合规评估程序的一部分，依据适用JS标准证明电气安全合规性。产品须与约旦市电供应（230 V / 50 Hz）物理兼容；中国I型（两或三扁销）或A型插头不原生兼容。通常须根据目标约旦市场细分提供额定230 V的G型或B型插头；通用转接头很常见，但产品级合规责任在于制造商。
summary.zht: 約旦市電為230 V交流/50 Hz。約旦為混合插頭環境，受美國和英國歷史遺產影響：B型（NEMA 5-15，美式兩/三扁插）和G型（BS 1363，英式三矩形扁插）插座均普遍存在，老舊建築和部分地區也有C型和F型。資訊和通訊技術設備及音視頻設備的電氣安全合規須依據IEC 62368-1（或對於仍在過渡範圍內產品的前身IEC 60950-1），按JISM約旦標準（JS）等效標準執行。JISM負責電氣安全標準管理。市電供電的無線設備在產品屬於JISM受監管範圍時，須作為JISM合規評估程序的一部分，依據適用JS標準證明電氣安全合規性。產品須與約旦市電供應（230 V / 50 Hz）物理相容；中國I型（兩或三扁插）或A型插頭不原生相容。通常須根據目標約旦市場細分提供額定230 V的G型或B型插頭；通用轉接頭很常見，但產品級合規責任在於製造商。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1:2018 (Audio/video, IT and communication technology equipment safety — 3rd edition)

summary.en: China uses 220 V AC / 50 Hz with Type I (two or three flat-pin) and Type A plug sockets. Electrical safety for IT and AV equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 60950-1) and progressively GB 4943.23 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1). CCC certification covers electrical safety for products listed in the CCC catalogue. Chinese products tested to GB 4943.1 hold CCC marks but are rated for 220 V with Type I or A plugs, not 230 V with Type B or G plugs.
summary.zh: 中国使用220 V交流/50 Hz，I型（两或三扁销）及A型插座。IT及音视频设备的电气安全依据GB 4943.1（相当于IEC 60950-1）及逐步推进的GB 4943.23（相当于IEC 62368-1）执行。CCC认证涵盖CCC目录内产品的电气安全。依GB 4943.1测试并持有CCC标志的中国产品额定220 V，配备I型或A型插头，不适用于230 V B型或G型插头。
summary.zht: 中國使用220 V交流/50 Hz，I型（兩或三扁插）及A型插座。IT及音視頻設備的電氣安全依據GB 4943.1（相當於IEC 60950-1）及逐步推進的GB 4943.23（相當於IEC 62368-1）執行。CCC認證涵蓋CCC目錄內產品的電氣安全。依GB 4943.1測試並持有CCC標誌的中國產品額定220 V，配備I型或A型插頭，不適用於230 V B型或G型插頭。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2011 (IT equipment safety — equivalent to IEC 60950-1)
GB 4943.23-2023 (audio/video/IT equipment safety — equivalent to IEC 62368-1)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — electrical safety scope
GB 1002 / GB 2099 (Chinese plug and socket standards)

gap.en: Jordan uses 230 V / 50 Hz with a mixed plug environment (Type B and Type G sockets most common, Type C/F also present), while China uses 220 V / 50 Hz with Type I or A plugs. Wireless devices with mains power supplies must be rated for 230 V and supplied with or compatible with appropriate plug types for the Jordanian market. CCC electrical safety certification to GB 4943.1 is not recognised in Jordan; IEC 62368-1 test evidence under JISM/JS standards is required where the product is in JISM regulated scope. Power supply unit rating for 230 V or dual-voltage (100-240 V) specification is strongly recommended. The mixed plug environment means exporters should specify plug type in their commercial documentation and consider providing Type G or universal adapters.
gap.zh: 约旦使用230 V / 50 Hz，混合插头环境（B型和G型插座最为常见，也有C型/F型），而中国使用220 V / 50 Hz的I型或A型插头。带市电电源的无线设备须额定230 V并为约旦市场提供或兼容适当的插头类型。GB 4943.1下的CCC电气安全认证不被约旦承认；若产品属于JISM受监管范围，须提供JISM/JS标准下的IEC 62368-1测试证据。强烈建议电源额定230 V或双电压规格（100-240 V）。混合插头环境意味着出口商应在商业文件中注明插头类型，并考虑提供G型或通用转接头。
gap.zht: 約旦使用230 V / 50 Hz，混合插頭環境（B型和G型插座最為常見，也有C型/F型），而中國使用220 V / 50 Hz的I型或A型插頭。帶市電電源的無線設備須額定230 V並為約旦市場提供或相容適當的插頭類型。GB 4943.1下的CCC電氣安全認證不被約旦承認；若產品屬於JISM受監管範圍，須提供JISM/JS標準下的IEC 62368-1測試證據。強烈建議電源額定230 V或雙電壓規格（100-240 V）。混合插頭環境意味著出口商應在商業文件中注明插頭類型，並考慮提供G型或通用轉接頭。

source.publisher: JISM — Jordan Institution for Standards and Metrology (مؤسسة المواصفات والمقاييس)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance to IEC 62368-1 under JISM Jordan Standards (JS) is required for mains-powered wireless devices sold in Jordan. Jordan uses 230 V / 50 Hz with a mixed plug environment (Type B and G most common); Chinese power accessories rated for 220 V with Type I or A plugs must be adapted. CCC certification to GB 4943.1 is not accepted as a substitute. Dual-voltage (100-240 V) power supplies and a Type G or Type B plug are recommended for the Jordanian market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在约旦销售的市电供电无线设备须符合JISM约旦标准（JS）下的IEC 62368-1电气安全要求。约旦使用230 V / 50 Hz，混合插头环境（B型和G型最为常见）；额定220 V的I型或A型中国电源配件须进行适配。GB 4943.1下的CCC认证不可作为替代。建议为约旦市场提供双电压（100-240 V）电源及G型或B型插头。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在約旦銷售的市電供電無線設備須符合JISM約旦標準（JS）下的IEC 62368-1電氣安全要求。約旦使用230 V / 50 Hz，混合插頭環境（B型和G型最為常見）；額定220 V的I型或A型中國電源配件須進行適配。GB 4943.1下的CCC認證不可作為替代。建議為約旦市場提供雙電壓（100-240 V）電源及G型或B型插頭。
